lessons.title: Creating Empty Files: `touch`
lessons.description: Learn to create blank files instantly. The foundation of file manipulation.

lessons.title: Making Directories: `mkdir`
lessons.description: Build the folders that will house your digital empire.

lessons.title: Copying and Moving: `cp` and `mv`
lessons.description: Duplicate files and relocate them anywhere in the filesystem.

lessons.title: Deleting Files and Directories: `rm` and `rmdir`
lessons.description: The art of digital destruction. Handle with extreme care.

lessons.title: Safe Practices and Wildcards
lessons.description: Avoid disasters with interactive deletion and bulk operations using wildcards.
